title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.150 - Filing of copies of findings and decrees incorporating district
text:
321.150.  Filing of copies of findings and decrees incorporating district. — Within thirty days after the final order of the circuit court of the county in which the district has been declared a public corporation, the circuit clerk of that court shall transmit to the county clerk and to the recorder of deeds in each county in which the district is located copies of the findings and decrees of the court incorporating the district.  The same shall be filed in the same manner as articles of incorporation are required to be filed under the general laws concerning corporations, and each recorder and clerk shall receive a fee of one dollar for filing and preserving the same.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 432 § 16, A.L. 1978 S.B. 628)
